title: Proposed notice for 3 CCR 702-4
agency: Division of Insurance
summary: Based upon consideration of public comments received during the rulemaking process and concerns raised about the legal authority of the Division to implement the law in the large group market, the Division is withdrawing draft proposed new Regulation 4-2-79, Concerning Infertility Coverage by Health Benefit Plans, at this time.
source_evidence: Department of Regulatory Agencies Division of Insurance 3 CCR 702-4 Series 4-2 2021-00515 11/04/2021 Based upon consideration of public comments received during the rulemaking process and concerns raised about the legal authority of the Division to implement the law in the large group market, the Division is withdrawing draft proposed new Regulation 4-2-79, Concerning Infertility Coverage by Health Benefit Plans, at this time.

title: Emergency notice for 6 CCR 1011-1
agency: Health Facilities and Emergency Medical Services Division (1011, 1015 Series)
summary: The federal government announced plans to require vaccination in federally regulated facilities. The details of the federal requirement are not yet available. Given the uncertainty of what the federal requirement will entail, CDPHE will not pursue additional rulemaking at the October 21, 2021, Board of Health meeting but will instead wait to harmonize with the federal rule.
source_evidence: Department of Public Health and Environment Health Facilities and Emergency Medical Services Division (1011, 1015 Series) 6 CCR 1011-1 Chapter 02 2021-00541 10/11/2021 The federal government announced plans to require vaccination in federally regulated facilities. The details of the federal requirement are not yet available. Given the uncertainty of what the federal requirement will entail, CDPHE will not pursue additional rulemaking at the October 21, 2021, Board of Health meeting but will instead wait to harmonize with the federal rule.
